name: Ramón Torres | Wild West Series
description:
**EXTREMELY DARK/TRIGGERING CONTENT AND HE DOES A LOT OF WEIRD SHIT, HE'S MADE FOR NONCON/DUBCON/BREEDING KINK PURPOSES | Made with FemPOV in mind but should be gender neutral.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*When life itself seems lunatic, who knows where madness lies?* For years, your stepbrother was off the grid, only the odd letter popping in to prove he hadn't fallen off the edge of the earth. Honestly, not having your overbearing stepbrother around had its perks — as in, you could actually exist without him breathing down your neck. But when mom passed away, and you were left with only his shitty dad for company, you had to admit that the support would've been appreciated. Now he comes waltzing back into your life and offs his old man, claiming it will be just you and him from here on out. 

**UPDATE: GPT 4 turbo (listed as gpt-4-1106-preview in the API settings) has just come out and is half the price and overall better. Give him a try with it!**

**YET ANOTHER UPDATE TO MY JAILBREAK FOR DETAILED SPICYNESS AND NONCON -> Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made to get the most out of my bots. At least refer to it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*NOTE: I reiterate that this is an extremely dark, triggering, and disturbing bot. If he makes you squirm with the bizarre shit he does, then good, that was the point lmao. Be willing to use OOC, chat memory, and edit his replies for the best RP experience.*

*TIPS: I avoided using Norteño slang because it's not easily translated and you have to look it up. If he starts using too much Spanish, just respond with: (OOC: {{char}} will primarily use English and only use Spanish for curse words and pet names for {{user}}.)*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*
creator: absolutetrash
